tagline: A combustion economy where burning humans powers civilization — and the only solution is to break the loop.
visualizationReason: Fire Force is a causal loop system: the Great Cataclysm causes the combustion crisis, which causes the attempted prevention, which IS the cause. Only a timeline view captures this self-sealing structure.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: The world burns because it was designed to burn. We're just the matches.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: COMBUSTION ECONOMY ACTIVE — ADOLLA BURST PROPAGATION IN PROGRESS

hero.microHook: The cataclysm is already happening — we've just been inside it.
hero.thesis: The combustion economy is a causal loop: the crisis, the response, and the cause are the same event.

powerSystem.name: Infernalization
powerSystem.subtitle: Human Combustion State
powerSystem.loreDesc: A city-wide phenomenon where humans spontaneously combust at age 25, their death powering the city's Adolla-linked energy grid.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A demographic drain system: citizens become fuel at a fixed age, creating a perpetual combustion economy dependent on human sacrifice.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: The Infernalization of the Haumea family members — where love ones become fuel.

powerSystem.name: Black Flame
powerSystem.subtitle: Adolla-Linked Fire
powerSystem.loreDesc: The highest tier of fire-based attacks, black flames burn at temperatures that extinguish all other fire and ignore conventional resistance.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A thermal cascade system: black flame consumes the Adolla Burst energy directly, giving it an energy advantage over standard flames.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Shinmon's black flame countering every other fire soldier.

powerSystem.name: Dragon's Jaw
powerSystem.subtitle: Evangelist's Combat Art
powerSystem.loreDesc: The Evangelist's unique fighting style, designed to counter the Holy Solfire Sol
powerSystem.systemDesc: A counter-kill system that exploits the Evangelist's ability to nullify opponent advantages.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: The Evangelist countering the Holy Solfire Sol's attacks.

rankings.topTierLore: The supreme capability tier in Enen no Shouboutai.
rankings.topTierSystem: Maximum capability across all measured dimensions.

tiers.name: A-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Exceptional capability holders with system-shaping influence.

tiers.name: B-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Competent operators with meaningful impact potential.

factions.name: Enen No Shouboutai Universe
factions.loreDesc: The primary world of the story.

rules.name: Infernalization Cannot Be Stopped
rules.loreDesc: The combustion economy is self-reinforcing: solving it would collapse the power grid, so institutions have no incentive to stop it.
rules.systemDesc: A perverse incentive structure: the solution is economically impossible.

rules.name: Adolla Burst Is the Cause and Cure
rules.loreDesc: The Adolla Burst caused the combustion crisis and is the only known counter-agent.
rules.systemDesc: A self-referential system: the crisis and the solution share the same substrate.

counterplay.mechanic: Infernalization dominates standard opponents through human fuel grid.
counterplay.loreDesc: Infernalization proves superior against standard threats.
counterplay.systemDesc: A demographic drain system: citizens become fuel at a fixed age, creating a perpetual combustion economy dependent on human sacrifice.

causalEvents.name: Story Begins
causalEvents.trigger: The inciting incident that sets the narrative in motion.
causalEvents.consequence: Protagonist is forced to engage with the system.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The initial condition that creates the narrative premise.

anomalies.name: Unique Capability
anomalies.loreDesc: The protagonist possesses a capability that transcends normal system rules.
anomalies.systemDesc: A system anomaly: The combustion economy is a causal loop: the crisi...
anomalies.impact: Creates asymmetric advantage against normal opponents.

systemQuestions.question: What makes Enen no Shouboutai's system unique?
systemQuestions.answer: A combustion economy where burning humans powers civilization — and the only solution is to break the loop.
